channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-11
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. Notably, the `statcheck` and `escicheck` projects have made administrative updates and synchronized with other repositories, respectively, to improve their functionality. Meanwhile, `docpluck` has addressed documentation and test issues, and `coarse` has re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker. The `regcheck` project has made strides in preparing for production and developing registered report features. Additionally, smaller but important updates have been made to `auto-zcurve` and `output-it-forward`, including revisions to validation notes and the addition of a Chrome Webstore link. These connections between projects demonstrate the collaborative spirit of our community, and we celebrate the progress being made to advance open-source research tools.

30 commits across 2 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

metacheck15 commits
regcheck15 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. This merge was done to integrate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, administrative updates were made, as indicated by the commit message "admin updates". The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch is the only branch mentioned in the commits, and all changes were made to this branch. The nature of the administrative updates is not specified beyond the commit message.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 9 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

Work was done on the "staging" branch, where the commit "strip beta references" removed beta references. The "phase 5 prod prep", "phase 3 prod prep", and "commit phase 2 prod push" commits prepared the repository for production in phases 2, 3, and 5. The "minor additions preclin" commit added minor features or changes before clinical preparations. Additionally, the "roll back RR overkill", "third phase of RR creation", "stage 2 RR dev", and "first phase: registered report mode" commits focused on registered report development, including rolling back overkill, creating and developing in stages, and initializing the mode. The "first phase: registered report mode" commit specifically started the registered report mode.

9 commit(s) today:

  • ffa8ea4 [staging] strip beta references — Jamie Cummins
  • 2751f19 [staging] phase 5 prod prep — Jamie Cummins
  • 5092647 [staging] minor additions preclin — Jamie Cummins
  • 820b166 [staging] phase 3 prod prep — Jamie Cummins
  • 575f010 [staging] commit phase 2 prod push — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
